blocks.content: Shirone focused his mind even more.
Ignoring what the Image Zone showed, he delved solely into the Spirit Zone,
and the already large sphere expanded to twice its size.
The upperclassmen's jaws dropped.
The recorded measurement showed a diameter of 41 meters.
Considering that Class Four's average diameter was 27 meters, this was close to graduation-level.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: Wh-what? How is his Zone that big?
Etra was equally surprised.
Of course, the Spirit Zone could grow in size through training.
But it required not just physical endurance like knights but also mental growth through enlightenment.
The body was honest—persistent training would yield results.
But the mind was a battle against vague illusions with no clear answers.
Countless magicians in the world spend their entire lives without achieving their goals and end up frustrated.
This was why magic was considered the domain of talent.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I've never seen a Zone this outstanding from the start. He must have grown up contemplating the world and exploring his inner self from a young age. But he's only 18 now—is this really possible?
Unlike before, Shirone now felt confident.
As the Spirit Zone grew, he could feel the frame stabilizing.
Unaware of the many students staring at him in astonishment, he was solely focused on connecting the Spirit Zone's skeleton.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Don't obsess. Link them all at once.
Gritting his teeth, Shirone widened his eyes.
As he shifted into the Defensive Type of the Four Directions Method, the large sphere tightened around him as if trying to crush him.
creaking

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: Whoa……
A groan escaped from somewhere.
Shirone examined the Four Directions Method he had manifested with wonder.
It felt like being trapped inside a diamond crystal.
It was a perfectly interlocked form, just like the polyhedron Etra had demonstrated.
The Zone's diameter was 13 meters.
From 41 meters to 13 meters meant 30% efficiency, but success was still success.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: He really did it! A freshman performed the Four Directions Method on the first day!
The naive Class Seven students made a fuss, causing some upperclassmen to frown.
But there were also quite a few who viewed him favorably because of his numbers.
Most of them were female students.
Amy didn't belong to either group.
She just found Shirone increasingly irritating.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Why had she forgotten? The reason she had resolved to study magic was because Shirone had humiliated her.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: What's his deal?
This wasn't a school you could enter just because you had talent.
He must have had a backer.
Who was behind him?

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: Teacher, the volume shrank way more than I expected.

blocks.speaker: Teacher
blocks.content: Huh? It's only natural.

blocks.speaker: Teacher
blocks.content: But the durability must have improved significantly.

blocks.speaker: Teacher
blocks.content: It should withstand some physical impact.
Shirone agreed.
The frame's solidity was palpable.
At this level, even physical shocks wouldn't risk ejection from the Spirit Zone.
Etra scratched her eyebrow.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: The rumors about him surprising the teachers during the entrance test must be true.
Of course, you couldn't get full on the first bite.
She acknowledged his remarkable insight, but his success with the Defensive Type was due to his Convergent Type inclination and abnormally large Zone.
Finally noticing the reactions around him, Shirone reverted to a shy boy and retreated to a corner.
Perhaps because he was buried in stares, he didn't notice Amy glaring at him intensely.
